3017190.name: Z-Factor Demo
3017190.description: This demo differs from the full version in the absence of top weapons, For this reason, it is incredibly difficult to completely complete the game. However, if you select the "City" menu item, you can go directly to the final location. There you can get acquainted with the bonus game that is offered after completing the adventure. This is a kind of homeless simulator, imitation of survivalin a city where everything you need is available only for money. A character who has completed the main story has the ability to supportyour existence for free and save money. In particular, you can buy a ticketback to the island. However, without skills and outfit you will feel acute lack of money. However, you will get some idea about what awaits you in the full version of the game.
3017190.supported_languages:
英语*, 俄语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
